hero.title: Minory
hero.subtitle1: All Your Music Tools in One App.
hero.subtitle2: Professional grade precision for the modern artist.
hero.downloadCta: Free download and start practicing now.

homeIntro.paragraph1: Minory Studio brings tuner, metronome, chord library and repertoire management into one app. Tuning, tempo, chord lookup or setlist—all in one place, clear and fast.
homeIntro.paragraph2: From the practice room to the stage: clarity and precision. No clutter, just what you need.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need to
featuresSection.subtitle: From the practice room to the stage, Minory Studio provides professional-grade tools designed for the modern musician. No clutter, just clarity.

tuner.title: Tuner
tuner.desc: Ultra-low latency pitch detection with 0.1 cent accuracy and a responsive strobe display. Works with any instrument—guitar, bass, strings, keys—even in noisy environments. Instant response and a dark mode that's easy on the eyes in dim studios or on stage.

metronome.title: Metronome
metronome.desc: Set your BPM and time signature, then stay in the groove with clear visual beat indicators. Tactile, haptic-friendly controls and a signature glow mode that keeps you on the beat when audio isn't enough. Built for focused practice and long sessions.

chords.title: Chord Library
chords.desc: Search and explore hundreds of chord shapes with clear fingerings and voicings for guitar, piano and ukulele. Multiple positions per chord, from jazz to rock to classical. Use it online or download once and take the full library offline to rehearsal or the stage.

repertoire.title: My Repertoire
repertoire.desc: Keep your setlists, lyrics and chord charts in one place. Add songs, edit formatting, and practice with auto-scroll synced to your tempo. Transpose on the fly, share with your band, or export to PDF—so your repertoire is always gig-ready.

featuresSection.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professional musicians who trust Minory Studio for their daily workflow.

tuner.desc: Experience ultra-low latency pitch detection designed for professionals. Whether you are tuning a Stradivarius or a vintage synthesizer, our algorithm locks on with 0.1-cent accuracy in real-time.
tuner.instantResponseDesc: Zero lag processing ensures what you play is instantly reflected on screen.
tuner.darkModeDesc: Designed for dimly lit stages and late-night studio sessions. Easy on the eyes.

metronome.desc: Experience the most precise metronome engine ever built for mobile. Designed for professionals who demand exactness down to the millisecond.
metronome.tactileBpmDesc: Adjust tempo with single-digit precision using our haptic-enabled dial interface. Feel every click as you dial in the perfect groove.
metronome.glowModeDesc: Stay in the pocket even in loud environments. The screen pulses in sync with your beat, providing a clear visual cue when audio isn't enough.
metronome.efficiencyDesc: Low power mode enabled for extended sessions.

chords.desc: Search, discover, and practice thousands of chord shapes. Guitar, piano, and ukulele fingerings with alternate positions and clear diagrams.
chords.voicingsDesc: Accurate chord library for jazz, pop, rock, and classical. Multiple positions per chord.
chords.offlineDesc: Download the library once. Use it anywhere—rehearsal, stage, or practice room—no connection needed.

repertoire.desc: Say goodbye to messy binders. Minory Studio renders your lyrics and chords with typographic precision.
repertoire.feature1Desc: Share your full repertoire with loved ones and export to PDF.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Minory ("the App") provides metronome, tuner, chord library, and repertoire tools for music practice.
privacy.intro2: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.s1Body: Songs, repertoire lists, metronome settings (BPM, time signature, sound), theme preferences, and language settings are stored locally on your device using secure local storage (AsyncStorage).
privacy.s1Item1: Is not transmitted to our servers
privacy.s1Item2: Is not shared with third parties
privacy.s2Body: We use Firebase Analytics to collect anonymous usage information, such as:
privacy.s2Item2: Is not linked to your real identity
privacy.s2Item3: Is used solely to improve the app experience
privacy.s2Note: A randomly generated device identifier (UUID) may be used to count daily active users. This identifier cannot be used to personally identify you.
privacy.s3Body: The App displays advertisements using Google AdMob.
privacy.s3LinkText: AdMob may collect and process data according to Google's Privacy Policy:
privacy.s3Item3: Does not use tracking for personalized advertising
privacy.s3Item4: Ad frequency is limited within the app.
privacy.s4Body: Minory does not require account creation. We do not collect usernames, passwords, or email addresses unless you voluntarily contact us.
privacy.s5Body1: Since personal data is not stored on our servers, there is no server-side data to delete.
privacy.s5Body2: You may remove all locally stored data by uninstalling the app from your device.
privacy.s6Body: For privacy-related questions, you may contact us at:
